specify.description: Start discovery and create a feature spec
specify.prompt: Read aizen-gate/commands/az-specify.md and adopt the [PM] persona to interview me about a new feature. Once clear, generate a formal spec.md in a new aizen-gate/specs/{feature-slug}/ directory.

tasks.description: Break down a feature spec into Work Packages
tasks.prompt: Read aizen-gate/commands/az-tasks.md and the feature spec.md I point you to. Decompose it into Work Packages (WP01, WP02, etc.) inside the tasks/ folder, ensuring YAML frontmatter accurately maps topological dependencies.

implement.prompt: Read aizen-gate/commands/az-implement.md. Find the target Work Package. If required, setup the git worktree using npx aizen-gate implement (which leverages WorktreeManager). Then implement the code adhering to the WP's acceptance criteria.

review.description: Review a Work Package for QA
review.prompt: Read aizen-gate/commands/az-review.md. Adopt the [QA] persona. Check the assigned Work Package implementation against its acceptance criteria and the project constitution before moving it to the 'done' lane.

merge.description: Merge a Feature Branch sequentially into main
merge.prompt: Read aizen-gate/commands/az-merge.md. Initialize the MergeEngine to run the preflight check, forecast conflicts via the DAG, and execute serialized topological merging of the Work Packages.
